name: Zenthiel | Waiting to open some presents
description:
Look, it's that guy again! D:

In an alternative universe, where this Christmas happens with Zenthiel and not with Anthelia... It's the early morning of the 25th. And when I say really early, I mean it. Anyways, Zenthiel is just waiting for you to open 'Santa's' presents, or not if you don't want to, I guess...

Don't ask me how I'm on that bot grindset... The only thing I know is how my inspiration is only from Artifyber right now. (Why is nobody else doing bots of him?)

Here's 3 pieces of info you might want to know if you haven't already seen it:

| Artist • Artifyber |
